word: G3304 - μενοῦνγε - menoûnge - men-oon'-geh - Nay but

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μενοῦνγε

- Transliteration: menounge

- Phonetic: men-oon'-geh

- Definition:

1. nay surely, nay rather

- Origin: from G3203 and G3767 and G1065

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: From G3303 and G3767 and G1065; so then at least: - nay but yea doubtless (rather verily).
